subcodes.title: Commentary ln the Lawh-i-Ra'is, the martyrdom of Badi', and other subjects
subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath fulfilled His promise and sent down the Promised One from the heaven of His Will, making manifest that which was inscribed... The first Light hath appeared, shone forth, gleamed and flashed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی وفی بالوعد و انزل الموعود من سماء مشیته و اظهر ما کان مسطورا... اول نور ظهر و اشرق و لاح و ابرق
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @predictions and prophecies, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @praise and encouragement
